title: Lullaby Animals Baby Keepsake Box – 6 Drawer Memory Box for Newborn Mementos – Baby Gift with Ribbon Closure
features: CHERISH BABY'S FIRST MEMORIES: A beautiful keepsake box designed to store and protect baby’s first treasures, from hospital bracelets to first shoes and more.
ORGANISED STORAGE DRAWERS: Includes 6 labelled compartments: Hospital Bracelet, Trinkets, Socks and Mittens, First Shoes, Memories, and Precious Things, making this perfect for organising mementos.
LOVELY LULLABY ANIMALS DESIGN: Features delightful original illustrations, with a space to personalise inside with baby’s name.
TIED WITH A RIBBON: A charming ribbon closure keeps everything neatly stored inside while adding a special finishing touch.
THOUGHTFUL NEW BABY GIFT: A meaningful gift for baby showers, new parents, or christenings.
description: Keep the magic of baby’s first moments safe with this beautifully designed Lullaby Animals Keepsake Box. Featuring adorable original artwork , this memory box is the perfect place to store and treasure baby’s most special mementos. Inside are six labelled drawers to help you organise keepsakes: Hospital Bracelet, Trinkets, Socks and Mittens, First Shoes, Memories, and Precious Things. Whether it's their tiny first shoes or their very first lock of hair, every drawer is ready to hold a little piece of your baby's story. With a soft ribbon tie and a space to personalise with your baby’s name, this keepsake box makes a truly thoughtful gift for new parents. Whether you’re buying for your own little one or looking for a special baby shower or christening present, it’s a beautiful way to celebrate those early days.
